mapper.select: select id, card_company, card_number_masked, billing_key, is_default, created_datetime from tbl_card where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_datetime is null order by is_default desc, created_datetime desc
select id, card_company, card_number_masked, billing_key, is_default, created_datetime from tbl_card where id = #{cardId} and member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_datetime is null
select count(*) from tbl_card where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_datetime is null
mapper.update: update tbl_card set is_default = false where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_datetime is null and is_default = true
mapper.select: select id, card_company, card_number_masked, billing_key, is_default, created_datetime from tbl_card where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_datetime is null order by created_datetime desc limit 1
